BackstoryDef.title: factory line worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the production lines of a Dominion factory district for years. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to keep [PAWN_possessive] head down, meet quota, and fix whatever broke before the foreman noticed.

BackstoryDef.title: assembly foreman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed a section of a factory floor, keeping workers on quota and machines running. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the corporations reward efficiency and punish everything else.

BackstoryDef.title: pipe maintenance worker
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years crawling through the maintenance corridors of a factory district, keeping pipes running that the corporations considered too cramped for mechanized upkeep. [PAWN_pronoun] kept the district breathing.

BackstoryDef.title: tenement builder
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] built and repaired tenement blocks that the corporations owned but never maintained. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to build things that lasted out of materials that should not have.

BackstoryDef.title: shaft miner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years in extraction shafts, pulling ore from rock in conditions the corporations described as acceptable. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a miner's instinct for what the rock would do next.

BackstoryDef.title: mine overseer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] supervised extraction operations in the lower mining districts, responsible for quota, safety, and the gap between the two. [PAWN_pronoun] learned which corners could be cut and which ones got people killed.

BackstoryDef.title: district medic
BackstoryDef.description: The lower districts have no official medical facilities worth the name. [PAWN_nameDef] filled the gap, treating industrial injuries and smog sickness with whatever could be sourced. [PAWN_pronoun] kept more people alive than anyone expected.

BackstoryDef.title: chemical exposure survivor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in a chemical processing facility until [PAWN_possessive] body could not take any more of it. [PAWN_pronoun] learned more about toxicology and its treatment than any licensed physician would consider comfortable.

BackstoryDef.title: smog sickness carer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years caring for the smog-sick in [PAWN_possessive] district, learning the slow progression of each condition and the treatments that bought time if not survival. [PAWN_pronoun] could not cure any of them. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to live with that.

BackstoryDef.title: factory cook
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fed thousands of factory workers across three daily shifts. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to produce edible food at speed and scale from ingredients that barely qualified as either.

BackstoryDef.title: district relief cook
BackstoryDef.description: At the lower district relief stations [PAWN_nameDef] worked the kitchens, feeding people with very little. [PAWN_pronoun] considered it the most important work [PAWN_pronoun] ever did.

BackstoryDef.title: black market cook
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran an unlicensed food operation in [PAWN_possessive] district, sourcing ingredients the corporations did not track and selling meals the corporations did not approve. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work fast and ask no questions.

BackstoryDef.title: underground grower
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained illegal hydroponic operations in the lower levels of [PAWN_possessive] district, supplying fresh produce to people the corporations considered adequately fed on nutrient paste. [PAWN_pronoun] disagreed.

BackstoryDef.title: algae cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the algae cultivation systems that supplemented the lower district food supply. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a detailed understanding of biological systems that could produce nutrition in toxic conditions.

BackstoryDef.title: sewer farmer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew food in the warm lower levels of [PAWN_possessive] district's sewer system, in spaces nobody monitored because nobody believed anything useful could grow there. [PAWN_pronoun] proved them wrong for years.

BackstoryDef.title: district enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the informal order of [PAWN_possessive] district, the kind that exists below the level of corporate security and fills the gaps it leaves. [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it in ways [PAWN_pronoun] does not always choose to think about.

BackstoryDef.title: pit fight organizer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran the pit fighting circuits of [PAWN_possessive] district, managing fighters, crowds, and the corporate enforcers who needed to be kept unaware. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that violence, properly organized, is just another business.

BackstoryDef.title: debt collector
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] collected debts for the informal lending operations that keep the lower districts functioning. [PAWN_pronoun] learned every technique of persuasion and what to do when persuasion was not enough.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate security grunt
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked the lowest tier of a corporate security apparatus, keeping order in districts the corporations valued only for their production output. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the difference between security and control.

BackstoryDef.title: rooftop sentry
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] kept watch over [PAWN_possessive] district from the rooftops, part of the informal early warning network that gave the lower districts what little warning they ever got. [PAWN_pronoun] became a patient and accurate shot.

BackstoryDef.title: gang enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the interests of one of the lower district gangs, learning that loyalty in that world is a currency that spends faster than it accumulates. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to spend it carefully.

BackstoryDef.title: black market operator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] ran one of the lower district black market operations, sourcing goods the corporations restricted and selling them to people who needed them. [PAWN_pronoun] learned every angle of a system designed to have none.

BackstoryDef.title: district fixer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] solved problems for the people of [PAWN_possessive] district, the kind that could not be taken to corporate authorities and had nowhere else to go. [PAWN_pronoun] became very good at finding solutions in a place designed not to have any.

BackstoryDef.title: labor negotiator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] represented factory workers in disputes with corporate management. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to find the small space the corporations left and use every bit of it.

BackstoryDef.title: vent preacher
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] moved through the lower district ventilation corridors spreading ideas the corporations had not authorized. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to speak quickly, move quietly, and trust very few people.

BackstoryDef.title: scrap merchant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traded salvaged components and scrap materials through the lower district networks. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that everything has a price and most people cannot afford it.

BackstoryDef.title: underground scholar
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] studied and taught in the unofficial education networks of [PAWN_possessive] district, the ones that existed because the corporate schools did not serve the people they were supposed to. [PAWN_pronoun] was careful about who [PAWN_pronoun] trusted.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate data thief
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] extracted proprietary data from corporate networks and sold it to whoever would pay. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the architecture of systems designed to keep people like [PAWN_objective] out and found it less impressive than the corporations believed.

BackstoryDef.title: factory saboteur
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] disrupted corporate production operations through carefully targeted acts of sabotage. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the infrastructure of the factories from the inside and used that knowledge accordingly.

BackstoryDef.title: tenement electrician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the electrical systems of the lower district tenement blocks, keeping power running to buildings the corporations would have preferred to leave dark. [PAWN_pronoun] worked with salvaged equipment and learned to make it do things it was not designed to do.

BackstoryDef.title: salvage specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] extracted usable components from industrial waste streams, developing an expert understanding of materials and their remaining utility. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the corporations throw away more than they know.

BackstoryDef.title: weapons technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained and modified the improvised weapons that circulate through the lower districts. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a technical understanding of ballistics and mechanism that no licensed armorer ever taught [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: district artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] documented the life of [PAWN_possessive] district in work that the corporations dismissed and [PAWN_possessive] neighbors recognized as true. [PAWN_pronoun] never stopped making it.

BackstoryDef.title: propaganda parodist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] produced satirical versions of corporate propaganda and distributed them through the lower district networks. [PAWN_pronoun] was never officially identified. [PAWN_pronoun] was very careful about that.

BackstoryDef.title: industrial graffiti artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] left [PAWN_possessive] mark across the factory districts, covering corporate surfaces with work the enforcers painted over and [PAWN_pronoun] replaced. [PAWN_pronoun] was never caught. [PAWN_pronoun] was very fast.

BackstoryDef.title: ore sorter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] processed extracted ore in the lower district facilities, developing a detailed knowledge of mineral grades and properties. [PAWN_pronoun] spent years doing work that machines could have done and learned not to think too hard about why they did not.

BackstoryDef.title: tunnel engineer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] designed and maintained tunnel networks beneath the lower districts, the unofficial ones nobody knew about and the official ones nobody maintained. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work in both.

BackstoryDef.title: smog district hunter
BackstoryDef.description: In the waste zones at the edge of the city [PAWN_nameDef] hunted the animals that survived the pollution. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that survival instinct takes strange forms in contaminated places.

BackstoryDef.title: lower district surgeon
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed surgery in the unlicensed medical facilities of [PAWN_possessive] district. [PAWN_pronoun] lost fewer patients than the statistics suggested [PAWN_pronoun] should.

BackstoryDef.title: oxygen ration monitor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the oxygen allocation systems for [PAWN_possessive] tenement block, making sure the generators ran and the rations were distributed fairly. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that in the lower districts the ability to breathe is a privilege that requires constant maintenance.

BackstoryDef.title: district herbalist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew and prepared herbal treatments for [PAWN_possessive] district, working with whatever plant life survived the toxic conditions to produce medicines the corporate facilities would not provide.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate waste diver
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] retrieved usable materials from corporate waste processing streams, working in conditions the corporations considered acceptable losses. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the chemical composition of industrial waste the hard way.

BackstoryDef.title: lower district farmer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained one of the unauthorized lower district farms, producing food in conditions designed to make food production impossible. [PAWN_pronoun] became very good at making things grow where the corporations said nothing could.

BackstoryDef.title: district animal handler
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed the working animals still used in the lower industrial districts, the ones the corporations use where machines are too expensive and people too valuable to waste. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that animals in that world adapt or die, same as everyone else.

BackstoryDef.title: tenement block warden
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] kept order in [PAWN_possessive] tenement block, managing disputes, organizing resources, and maintaining the fragile social structures that keep people from turning on each other. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that leadership in a place with nothing is the hardest kind.
